landing.heroSubtitle: Your mission is to decipher it.
landing.heroDescription: Explore real cities in Google Street View. Solve geospatial riddles. Compete against thousands of explorers. The first to complete all missions wins $1,000 USD.
landing.heroDescPrefix: Navigate Google Street View, solve historical riddles and compete against thousands of explorers. The first to complete all missions wins
landing.step1Desc: Choose your plan, pay with PayPal and receive your membership with credentials by email.
landing.step2Desc: The global synchronized timer marks when radar signals are revealed. Everyone starts at the same time.
landing.step3Desc: Walk real streets in Google Street View. Find the exact data each radar signal requires.
landing.step4Desc: The first explorer to complete all missions wins $1,000 USD. Only one wins.
landing.countdownLabel: COLUMBUS SAGA — COLONIAL ZONE, SANTO DOMINGO
landing.selectSagaDesc: Select a saga and begin your exploration
landing.firstMissionDesc: Chosen for its historical density and unique visual details captured by Street View. An immersive narrative that challenges you to find exact data in real colonial buildings.
landing.footerTagline: The world is not discovered. It is deciphered.
landing.footerCopyright: UBEX · Powered by Google Gemini & Maps Platform

auth.termsAgree: By signing up you agree to the
auth.welcomeBackDesc: Sign in to continue your digital archaeology adventure.
auth.serviceUnavailable: The authentication service is not available.
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password.
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Your email has not been confirmed. Check your inbox.
auth.connectionError: Connection error. Check your internet and try again.
auth.joinExpeditionDesc: Create your account and start exploring real streets, solving riddles and claiming treasures.
auth.createAccountSubtitle: Fill in the details to sign up
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account. It may take a few minutes to arrive.
auth.nameMinError: Name must be at least 2 characters.
auth.passwordMinError: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.alreadyRegisteredError: This email is already registered. Try signing in.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
auth.resetEmailMessage: If an account exists with {email}, you will receive a link to reset your password.

play.modeFreeDesc: No time limit. Explore at your own pace.
play.modeExplorerDesc: Against the clock. Each mission has a time limit.
play.protocolStep2: Enter the exact data to advance to the next mission
play.protocolStep3: Complete all missions to claim the treasure
play.tooFar: Get closer to the target coordinates to validate data
play.coordinatesVerified: Coordinates verified — advancing to next mission
play.diffFreeDesc: Answer from any position. You only need the exact data.
play.diffExplorerDesc: You must be within {radius}m of the signal location to answer. Navigate to the site!
play.rule1: Explore the streets of the Colonial Zone using Google Street View
play.rule2: Read each radar signal carefully — the answer is in what you see
play.rule3: Enter the exact data to advance to the next mission
play.rule4: Complete all {count} missions to claim the treasure
play.completionDesc: You have completed all {count} missions of the {saga} and explored {city} like a true digital archaeologist.
play.approachPlaceholder: Get closer to the location to answer...
play.tooFarFeedback: 📍 You are too far! Navigate to the signal coordinates ({distance}m)
play.tipText: Navigate with the mouse in Street View. Click on the floor arrows to move. Look for signs, plaques and architectural details.
play.dataLockVerified: [DATA LOCK] Coordinates verified — advancing to next mission

leaderboard.title: Global Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: The world's top explorers
leaderboard.noExplorers: No explorers on the leaderboard yet.

hud.bootLine2: Linking to Google Maps satellite constellation...
hud.bootWelcomeMsg: The world is a database. Your mission is to decipher it.

game.incorrectEliminated: Incorrect answer. You have been eliminated.
game.fallbackHint1: Weak signal detected. Explore the surroundings.
game.fallbackHint2: Partial data. The target is near a landmark.
game.fallbackHint3: Strong signal. Check visible names in your surroundings.
game.svLoadErrorHint: Check your Google Maps API key or your internet connection.
game.noSVCoverageDesc: This location has no Street View images. You can use the satellite view as reference or skip this mission.
